message:
[fix] Statusline script creation - add missing imports and escape bash variables

- Added missing path and os imports to enhancedClaudeFlowInit function
- Fixed bash variable escaping in createStatuslineScript() template literal
- Escaped ${MEM_COLOR}, ${CPU_COLOR}, ${SUCCESS_COLOR} to prevent JS interpolation
- Added error message logging for better debugging
- Verified in Docker: statusline now creates with executable permissions (755)
- Resolves 'Could not create statusline script' warning
